servinfo.title: Procedure after ECM Replacement

attention3.ptxt: When ECM and keyless start control module are replaced with new ones at the same time, perform “Immobilizer Key Registration” instead of “ECM Registration” using SUZUKI scan tool and immobilizer cable. Refer to “Immobilizer Control System Operator's Manual” for the immobilizer registration.

servinfo.ptxt: After ECM is replaced with new one, perform the following procedures:

s1.ptxt: Program calibration data to ECM. Refer to “Suzuki ECU Programming System Operator's Manual”.
Perform electric throttle control system calibration.
